message:
feat(showcase,layout): expand runner core gesture logic and add incremental layout E2E tests

Runner core (runner_core.rs, +61 lines):
- Extend gesture processing pipeline with additional state tracking
  and transition handling

E2E tests (e2e_incremental.rs, 1736 lines):
- Comprehensive end-to-end test suite for the incremental layout engine
  covering dirty propagation, partial relayout, hash deduplication,
  and interaction with the dependency graph under various mutation
  scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
